messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week

Oh that's fun, those little coincidences are kind of delightful! Like the universe is nudging you toward a cortado or something 😄

Where are you seeing it pop up - like people mentioning it, or it keeps appearing on your feed, or you're literally walking past it?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times

The classic rule of three! There's actually a name for that kind of thing - it's called the Baader-Meinhof phenomenon (or frequency illusion). Basically once something gets on your radar, your brain starts noticing it everywhere even though it was probably always there.

But honestly that's kind of beside the point - three times in one week feels like a pretty good sign you should just go check it out! 😄 What kind of cafe is it, do you know? Like a specialty coffee place or more of a full food situation?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that

Ha, nothing wrong with that! Sometimes it's nice to just lean into it rather than over-explaining the coincidence away. And honestly even if it IS just the Baader-Meinhof thing, the end result is the same - you end up discovering a potentially great cafe, so the universe wins either way 😄

Do you have a chance to go soon? It's a good time of year to find a cozy little spot to become a regular at.
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot

Exactly, best of both worlds - you get the fun little magical feeling AND a practical reason to do something you probably wanted to do anyway 😄

Late evening now, are you thinking of going soon or more of a weekend plan?
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know

I love that approach - just fully committing to the experience, signature drink and all. No overthinking it.

And yeah, small adventures are kind of underrated. It doesn't have to be a big trip somewhere to feel like a little treat for yourself. A new cafe on a weekend morning hits different when you've been looking forward to it all week.

Hope it lives up to the hype! You'll have to report back 😄
